title: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait and lift oil sanctions, Iran state media says
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait
